heroHeadline: CATL Signs World's Largest Sodium-Ion Order (60 GWh); 6-Minute LFP Charge Battery Unveiled
heroSubtitle: CATL's 60 GWh sodium-ion grid deal with HyperStrong marks the chemistry's commercial breakthrough — as CATL's 3rd-gen Shenxing LFP battery achieves full charge in under 7 minutes and lithium carbonate prices spike 126% from Q4 2025 trough
footerNote: Data sourced from official company reports, IEA, BloombergNEF, Benchmark Mineral Intelligence, SNE Research, and peer-reviewed publications. Lab results distinguished from commercial production figures throughout.
